children: In contrast with the phrase “perfectly imperfect,” that expresses acceptance of one’s flaws, “imperfectly perfect” reflects how people with EDs have an unhealthy (“imperfect”) desire to achieve a “perfect” body.
Alternatively, this could mean the exact opposite: being perfect by being imperfect.
Every Other Person Tries Out The Stuff & Activities Their Ideal Person Does, In Order To Look Like Them.

23853872.fragment: Everyone wants what the other one’s workin’

children: Here, Melanie is stating “Your body is imperfecty perfect” stating that nobody is perfect, everyone has their flaws, everybody is perfect in their own way, being perfect and imperfect at the same time.
“Everyone wants what the other one’s working”

Means that everyone wants to look like each other, some people will look at their friends and wished they looked like that, and other people might look at you, and wish they looked like you, everyone wants to look like eachother.

24159233.fragment:
Your body is imperfectly perfect
 Everyone wants what the other one’s workin’

children: In the context of the film “K-12” by Melanie Martinez, the character, Fleur, is unhappy with her body image, and she screams at a mirror, causing it to break down. This is a symbol of body dysmorphic disorders and how people react to them.

24501793.fragment: When you’re screamin’ at the mirror (Screamin’ at the mirror)

children: This pretty much means that some people don’t love there body and look at others and are jealous of what others have in stead of loving there body the way that it is
People with eating disorders always see themselves as distorted, or as how they don’t actually look. So they always think the way they look is a issue, hence why they have a ED.

25598145.fragment: The way you look is not an issue

children: This lyric shows convincment around Bulimia Nervosa. Typically telling people that nothing is wrong. There for, “fooling them”

27495471.fragment: Fooling those around of your bulimia

children: Some people hate their bodies but their are others who would kill to have their body

children: This most likely refers to wanting to act like everything is normal in front of others
